title: linaria heterophylla subsp. gigantea
intro: Linaria heterophylla subsp. gigantea, also known as giant toadflax or large-flowered toadflax, is a plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Linaria heterophylla subsp. gigantea include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, syrups, or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
